root_cause: PersistentVolumeClaim expansion is failing due to CSI or storage backend limitations
evidence: Explicit volume expansion failure events were observed
No successful expansion completion was observed
Dominant expansion error: resize volume "pvc-7a6b5c4d-3e2f-11ef-9abc-0a1b2c3d4e5f" failed: requested size 500Gi exceeds the maximum volume size supported by the storage backend

causes.message: CSI resizer or kubelet repeatedly retries volume expansion
Requested storage capacity was not applied to the volume
Workload may be constrained by unexpanded storage capacity

pvc:analytics-db-data: PVC expansion repeatedly failed and did not complete
pod:analytics-db-0: Pod may be impacted by insufficient or unexpanded storage

likely_causes: CSI driver does not support volume expansion
Storage backend quota or size limits were exceeded
Filesystem resize failed on the node
Volume cannot be expanded online for this driver or volume type
suggested_checks: Check CSI resizer and node plugin logs
